## Summary

Describe the change and the user impact.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run pack:check`
- [ ] `npm run security:audit`

## Security

- [ ] no new runtime dependency, or dependency risk was reviewed
- [ ] no new network, shell, credential, or file-write behavior without explicit rationale
- [ ] public CLI output does not expose secrets or local-only sensitive paths

## Docs

- [ ] updated README if public usage changed
- [ ] updated private maintainer planning if architecture or contract changed
- [ ] updated changelog if this is release relevant
